title: Keurig Dr Pepper: Good As A Defensive Play, But Not For Strong Upside
text: Keurig Dr Pepper has managed to grow nicely in recent years, especially from a cash flow perspective. The company is definitely a quality operator with a bright future, but the upside is unlikely to be remarkable.

title: How About A Dr Pepper?
text: Keurig Dr Pepper is a beverage company that is not getting enough investor attention. While I don't have any massive position in the company, it's a good business. I'll show you what makes KDP a good investment at the right price, and why I'm starting to keep a closer eye on the company.

title: 4 Top Dividend Stocks To Watch In The Stock Market Today
text: Check these dividend stocks out for your watchlist right now.

title: Options Traders Target 2 New S&P 500 Components
text: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc (NASDAQ:KDP) and ON Semiconductor Corp (NASDAQ:ON) are set to join S&P 500 Index (SPX) later this month, giving both stocks a bump today as they look for better exposure to everyday investors that tend to put more money into broad index funds.

title: These 3 Stock Are Joining the S&P 500 In June
text: This week, the S&P 500 will get three brand new members as part of the index's regular rebalancing. What Happened?

title: ON Semiconductor and 2 More Companies Will Join the S&P 500 This Month
text: Shares for all three companies joining the S&P 500 are higher in the premarket on Monday.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper Stock Appears To Be A Better Pick Over This Travel Company
text: We think that Keurig Dr Pepper stock (NYSE: KDP) currently is a better pick compared to Booking Holdings stock (NASDAQ: BKNG), given its better prospects and a comparatively lower valuation.
